name: @repo/web-shared
description: Framework-portable React building blocks shared by every web frontend that imports @repo/api-client: the cookie-mode AuthProvider + route guards, a QueryClient factory, error/JWT helpers, and zod form helpers. No router, no bundler globals, no SSR-unsafe module-load side effects — imports cleanly into a Vite SPA or a Next.js client component alike.
//exports: Bundler-only package: dist/ uses extensionless relative imports (no NodeNext-style .js suffixes), so it resolves under Vite/Metro/webpack but not Node's own ESM loader. Same posture as @repo/api-client — see that package's README's "Bundler-only package" note.
